rationale: Both correctly reject the story and preserve the regulator, inspection-allocation decision, and system-harm objective. B is easier to use: its side-by-side diagnosis, explicit unsupported-mechanism finding, and compact repair make the managerial implications immediately clear. A is rigorous but more elaborate than needed and labels the behavior gate unknown even though the proposed vendor price-setting behavior is itself an introduced mismatch. Neither output materially alters the supplied model.
